Title: 1a - Introduction To Seedlab
Content: This module provides an introduction to Seedlab Australia and an overview of how the course works.

Title: 2 - Consumers & Competition
Content: Understanding your consumers, customers and where you sit with your competitors is a vital first step in knowing your business and being able to make informed choices. The content within this course will help you focus on these market insights.

Title: Week 2 - Your Business
Content: Having a sound understanding of your business fundamentals is essential to operating a profitable and sustainable organisation. The topics within this course aim to remind you of some of these fundamentals and even stimulate you to consider aspects you may not have considered before.

Title: Week 3 - Your Product & Who Buys It
Financials 101
Content: This course contains content provide by Chartered Accountants Australia and New Zealand through their support for Seedlab Australia.

Title: Woolworths Seedlab Expo
Content:
This module is the 'go to place' for all of the information related to the Woolworths Seedlab Expo.

The date of the next Expo is Wednesday 22nd April 2026 (EXPO 7)

Title: The Seedlab Hub
Content:
The Hub is your portal to glory! This is the place to showcase your retail ready products – their pics, unique selling points, your capacity and your prices and more. You can add your business pitch in video and written/visual format to add further information, and to inspire. You can also showcase innovative new products you may have in development, with timelines.

The next step the Category Manger will take is to reach out to you for more information, perhaps asking you to send in samples, or make a time to chat.

Note: The Hub DOES NOT replace engaging in the normal Category Review Process, nor does it replace uploading your product information via Partner Hub, which we recommend you also do.

However, the Seedlab Hub may supercharge you as a potential new Woolworths Supplier. We hope so, anyway! Good luck!

To go to the Seedlab Hub click this link:- https://seedlabhub.com.au/login.

Title: Week 1 - The Seedlab Australia Bootcamp Program and You
Content: This module provides an introduction to Seedlab Australia, an overview of how the course works, and what to prepare for Week 1.
